name: @contextractor/engine-native
description: napi-rs binding around rs-trafilatura for the @contextractor/engine TypeScript package

scripts.build: node -e "if (!process.env.CARGO_HOME && !process.env.npm_config_rebuild_native) { console.log('@contextractor/engine-native: skipping build (committed prebuilds present; set CARGO_HOME or npm_config_rebuild_native=1 to rebuild).'); process.exit(0); } require('child_process').execSync('napi build --platform --release', { stdio: 'inherit' });"
